basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Group A Non Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 17 Medical Superintendent, Security Officer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) Group-A Non-Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 30 June 2026 on the official website https://www.aiimsbhopal.edu.in. A total of 17 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Bhopal Group-A Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 58 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for details.

qualification.education_qualification: Medical qualification as per IMC Act, PG Degree (MD/MS/MHA), M.Sc. Nursing, M.A./MSW, Degree in Architecture, BE/B.Tech/MCA, Degree in Medical Record Keeping, PG Diploma in Material Management
qualification.details: Medical Superintendent: Medical qualification as per IMC Act + PG (MD/MS/MHA or equivalent) + 10 years experience in Hospital Administration in a senior position, preferably in a 300-bed hospital. Superintending Engineer: Analogous post or Executive Engineer with 5 years in GP 7600 or 10 years in GP 6600. Chief Nursing Officer: Analogous post or 5 years in GP 6600 or 10 years in GP 5400 + M.Sc. Nursing from an INC recognized institute. Senior Analyst (System Analyst): Analogous post or 5 years in GP 6600 or above. Chief Medical Social Service Officer: Analogous post or 5 years in GP 5400 + M.A./MSW + 5 years experience in Medical social welfare. CSSD Officer: Analogous post or CSSD Supervisor with 5/7 years in GP 5400/4600. Hospital Architect: Degree in Architecture + 5 years experience (preferably from CPWD). Deputy Chief Security Officer: Analogous post or 5 years in PB-3 GP 5400+ with security experience. Nursing Superintendent: Analogous post or Deputy/Assistant Nursing Superintendent with 5 years in GP 5400. Senior Procurement-cum-Stores Officer: Analogous post or 5 years in GP 5400 + 5 years experience as Stores Officer. Senior Programmer (Analyst): Analogous post or 5 years in PB-3 GP 5400 + BE/B.Tech/MCA/B.Sc. + Diploma + 10 years IT experience. Principal Private Secretary (PPS): Analogous post or 7 years in GP 4600 or higher. Chief Medical Record Officer: Analogous post or 2/3 years in GP 4800/4600 + Degree in Medical Record Keeping + computer skills + typing speed. Stores Officer: Analogous post or 2/3 years in GP 4800/4600 + Degree + PG Diploma in Material Management or Bachelor's + 3 years store experience (preferably medical). Security Officer: Analogous post or 2/3 years in PB-2 GP 4800/4600 with security experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-10 to Level-14 as per 7th CPC
salary_details.details: Salary will be as per Level-10 to Level-14 of the 7th CPC. Specific salary details for each post are as follows: Medical Superintendent: Level-14 as per 7th CPC Superintending Engineer: Level-13 as per 7th CPC Chief Nursing Officer: Level-12 as per 7th CPC Senior Analyst (System Analyst): Level-12 as per 7th CPC Chief Medical Social Service Officer: Level-11 as per 7th CPC CSSD Officer: Level-11 as per 7th CPC Hospital Architect: Level-11 as per 7th CPC Deputy Chief Security Officer: Level-11 as per 7th CPC Nursing Superintendent: Level-11 as per 7th CPC Senior Procurement-cum-Stores Officer: Level-11 as per 7th CPC Senior Programmer (Analyst): Level-11 as per 7th CPC Principal Private Secretary (PPS): Level-11 as per 7th CPC Chief Medical Record Officer: Level-10 as per 7th CPC Stores Officer: Level-10 as per 7th CPC Security Officer: Level-10 as per 7th CPC

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.aiimsbhopal.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Bhopal Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical Superintendent: Medical qualification as per IMC Act + PG (MD/MS/MHA or equivalent) + 10 years experience in Hospital Administration in a senior position, preferably in a 300-bed hospital. Superintending Engineer: Analogous post or Executive Engineer with 5 years in GP 7600 or 10 years in GP 6600. Chief Nursing Officer: Analogous post or 5 years in GP 6600 or 10 years in GP 5400 + M.Sc. Nursing from an INC recognized institute. Senior Analyst (System Analyst): Analogous post or 5 years in GP 6600 or above. Chief Medical Social Service Officer: Analogous post or 5 years in GP 5400 + M.A./MSW + 5 years experience in Medical social welfare. CSSD Officer: Analogous post or CSSD Supervisor with 5/7 years in GP 5400/4600. Hospital Architect: Degree in Architecture + 5 years experience (preferably from CPWD). Deputy Chief Security Officer: Analogous post or 5 years in PB-3 GP 5400+ with security experience. Nursing Superintendent: Analogous post or Deputy/Assistant Nursing Superintendent with 5 years in GP 5400. Senior Procurement-cum-Stores Officer: Analogous post or 5 years in GP 5400 + 5 years experience as Stores Officer. Senior Programmer (Analyst): Analogous post or 5 years in PB-3 GP 5400 + BE/B.Tech/MCA/B.Sc. + Diploma + 10 years IT experience. Principal Private Secretary (PPS): Analogous post or 7 years in GP 4600 or higher. Chief Medical Record Officer: Analogous post or 2/3 years in GP 4800/4600 + Degree in Medical Record Keeping + computer skills + typing speed. Stores Officer: Analogous post or 2/3 years in GP 4800/4600 + Degree + PG Diploma in Material Management or Bachelor's + 3 years store experience (preferably medical). Security Officer: Analogous post or 2/3 years in PB-2 GP 4800/4600 with security experience.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 58 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for details.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Salary will be as per Level-10 to Level-14 of the 7th CPC. Specific salary details for each post are as follows: Medical Superintendent: Level-14 as per 7th CPC Superintending Engineer: Level-13 as per 7th CPC Chief Nursing Officer: Level-12 as per 7th CPC Senior Analyst (System Analyst): Level-12 as per 7th CPC Chief Medical Social Service Officer: Level-11 as per 7th CPC CSSD Officer: Level-11 as per 7th CPC Hospital Architect: Level-11 as per 7th CPC Deputy Chief Security Officer: Level-11 as per 7th CPC Nursing Superintendent: Level-11 as per 7th CPC Senior Procurement-cum-Stores Officer: Level-11 as per 7th CPC Senior Programmer (Analyst): Level-11 as per 7th CPC Principal Private Secretary (PPS): Level-11 as per 7th CPC Chief Medical Record Officer: Level-10 as per 7th CPC Stores Officer: Level-10 as per 7th CPC Security Officer: Level-10 as per 7th CPC

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.aiimsbhopal.edu.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Group-A Non-Faculty Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the AIIMS Bhopal Group-A Non-Faculty Posts is 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Group-A Non-Faculty Posts at AIIMS Bhopal?
faq.answer: There are a total of 17 vacancies announced for various Group-A Non-Faculty Posts at AIIMS Bhopal through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the AIIMS Bhopal Group-A Non-Faculty Posts recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the AIIMS Bhopal Group-A Non-Faculty Posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Group-A Non-Faculty Posts at AIIMS Bhopal is 58 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates will be as per Level-10 to Level-14 of the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC).

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications vary by post, but generally include a Medical qualification as per IMC Act, PG Degree (MD/MS/MHA), M.Sc. Nursing, M.A./MSW, Degree in Architecture, BE/B.Tech/MCA, Degree in Medical Record Keeping, or PG Diploma in Material Management, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Bhopal Group-A Non-Faculty Posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these posts as per the provided information.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for AIIMS Bhopal Group-A Non-Faculty Posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will primarily involve Document Verification followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of AIIMS Bhopal, which is www.aiimsbhopal.edu.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Deputation.
